titles.title: I’m Using My Bible for a Road Map

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’m using my Bible for a road map, Ten commandments they tell me what to do, The twelve disciples are my road signs; And Jesus will see me safely through.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There’ll be no detours in heaven, No rough roads along the way, I’m using my Bible for a road map, My last stop is heaven some sweet day.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’m using my Bible for a road map, The children of Israel used it too They crossed the Red sea of destruction, For God was there to see them through.
